title: Verify existing implementation of rate limit check
description: The rate limit check function `checkRateLimit(key, maxRequests, windowMs)` already exists in `src/auth/rate-limiter-utils.ts` with 6 passing tests covering: first request allowance, requests within limit, blocking excess requests, window expiration reset, independent key tracking, and accurate retryAfter values. Implementation uses in-memory Map with count/windowStart tracking.
existing_patterns: src/utils/*.ts - single-function utility files with co-located tests
